violations.text: Wood is used in the construction of (platform for chest freezer) in the (retail) area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024
The door to the (unisex ) toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2024
